/* Thermodynamics */Minor. Replaced "Secondly" with "Second," This makes it consistent with the first item, which is introduced with "First," Items in a list would be introduced with

First, ...
Second, ...
Third,

etc.

/* Structure */Minor.  Comprise means roughly "include," "is made up of, or "is composed of." In the sentence at hand, replaced "comprise" with "compose" to produce "the catalytic site and binding site together compose or constitute the enzyme's active site."
